item.name: Get a proxy XDS config on a CP, this endpoint is only available on zone CPs.

request.name: Get a proxy XDS config on a CP, this endpoint is only available on zone CPs.

description.content: Returns the [xds](https://www.envoyproxy.io/docs/envoy/latest/api-docs/xds_protocol) configuration of the proxy.

query.description: When computing XDS config the CP take into account policies with 'kuma.io/effect: shadow' label

An array of extra fields to include in the response. When `include=diff` the server computes a diff in JSONPatch format
between the current proxy XDS config and the config returned in the 'xds' field.

An array of extra fields to include in the response. When `include=diff` the server computes a diff in JSONPatch format
between the current proxy XDS config and the config returned in the 'xds' field.

(Required) The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the diff for.
